# Manual Playtest Checklist

## Core Loop
- Start a new puzzle.
- Perform core interactions across multiple board cells.
- Confirm invalid actions produce visible feedback.
- Confirm automatic feedback markers update after key actions.

## Helpers
- Use hint/help and verify a valid target is highlighted.
- Use Clear and confirm board resets.
- Toggle How to play and verify panel behavior.

## Difficulty Search
- Request a realistic target value (for example 80-150).
- Verify progress updates while searching.
- Confirm status message reflects match or closest result.

## Completion
- Solve a puzzle correctly.
- Verify win banner appears with time and mistake stats.
- Start Play again from the banner.
